summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

raw_articles.title: Google backs nuclear fusion startup targeting Europe’s first commercial power plant
raw_articles.summary: Proxima Fusion has raised $468 million as it looks to move towards commercializing the promising but infamously difficult technical challenge of nuclear fusion.

raw_articles.title: NVIDIA and Hugging Face Bring New Models and Frameworks to LeRobot for the Open Robotics Community
raw_articles.summary: Open source AI has shown how quickly developers can innovate when models, data and tools are shared. Robotics has the same opportunity, but advancements in physical AI development can still be gated by costly and fragmented resources, from large datasets and robot foundation models to simulation, compute and validation tools. NVIDIA and Hugging Face are […]

raw_articles.title: Chinese AI models are gaining ground with U.S. companies as OpenAI, Anthropic costs surge
raw_articles.summary: Recent model releases from Chinese companies including DeepSeek and Z.ai are seen by many as highly competitive compared to leading U.S. frontier systems.

raw_articles.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
raw_articles.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's headlines suggested.

raw_articles.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
raw_articles.summary: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

raw_articles.title: China's Alibaba bans Anthropic AI for employees after 'distillation attack' accusation

raw_articles.title: Anthropic's new "J-lens" reveals a silent workspace inside Claude that mirrors a leading theory of consciousness
raw_articles.summary: Anthropic, the artificial intelligence company, published a sweeping research paper on Sunday revealing that its Claude language models have spontaneously developed an internal structure that mirrors one of the most influential theories of how human consciousness works. raw_articles.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta

raw_articles.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
raw_articles.summary: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.
